description: Trigger accuracy evaluation for the kling-ai skill. Each entry is a user prompt that should or should not trigger this skill. Used with the skill-creator eval framework.

should_trigger.query: Make me a Kling AI prompt for an image-to-video animation of a perfume bottle with subtle light reflections.
should_trigger.why: Direct Kling I2V request - canonical trigger

should_trigger.query: How do I make an AI video where someone is talking? I have a photo of the person and a recorded voiceover.
should_trigger.why: Avatar 2.0 use case - photo + audio = talking avatar

should_trigger.query: What's the difference between Kling 3.0 and Kling 2.6?
should_trigger.why: Model selection question - core skill scope

should_trigger.query: Help me write a cinematic prompt for a 4-shot storyboard about a product launch.
Animate this image so the hair moves gently in the wind.
I want to use the same character across multiple Kling videos. How?
should_trigger.why: Character LoRA / consistency - documented in skill

should_trigger.query: How much does Kling cost per video? Is the free tier enough for testing?
should_trigger.why: Pricing question - skill covers this (in references/pricing.md)

should_trigger.query: My Kling generation is stuck at 99%. What went wrong?
should_trigger.why: Troubleshooting - covered in Common Issues table

should_trigger.query: Translate this Polish prompt into something I can paste into Kling.
should_trigger.why: English-prompt policy is core skill content

should_trigger.query: How do I use Draft Mode in Kling to save credits?
should_trigger.why: Draft Mode - new feature explicitly documented

should_trigger.query: Stwórz mi prompt do Klinga na video produktowe perfum.
should_trigger.why: Polish-language Kling request - skill handles cross-language

should_trigger.query: I need to generate a 30-second talking head video in Polish from a single photo.
should_trigger.why: Avatar 2.0 + duration constraint - skill should explain Avatar workflow

should_not_trigger.query: Generate a thumbnail for my YouTube video about cooking.
should_not_trigger.why: Image generation, not video - nano-banana skill territory

should_not_trigger.query: Write me a Veo 3 prompt for a product commercial.
should_not_trigger.why: Different video model (Google Veo), not Kling

should_not_trigger.query: How do I install Premiere Pro on macOS?
should_not_trigger.why: Video editing software install, not AI video generation

should_not_trigger.query: Recommend a stock footage site for my landing page.
Help me write a YouTube video description for my latest upload.
should_not_trigger.why: Text content for video - not Kling prompt

should_not_trigger.query: What's the best codec for exporting a 4K video from Final Cut?
should_not_trigger.why: Video export technical question, no AI generation involved

should_not_trigger.query: Suggest a tagline for a marketing video about insurance.

edge_cases.query: I'm comparing AI video tools - is Runway Gen-4 or Kling 3.0 better for my use case?
edge_cases.why: User mentions Kling explicitly and asks for comparison - skill should engage on the Kling side

edge_cases.query: I have a SaaS product, write me a 30-second ad video script.
edge_cases.why: Video script, not AI video generation prompt. No Kling/Avatar/I2V terms.
